SEARCH
Package edu.bu.pas.risk.action

Record Class AttackAction

java.lang.Object
java.lang.Record
edu.bu.pas.risk.action.AttackAction
Record Components:
agentId - The agent doing this attack.
from - The territory the agent is attacking from.
to - An adjacent enemy territory to attack.
attackingArmies - The number of attacking armies, [1, 3].
movingArmies - The number of armies to move, >=attackingArmies.
All Implemented Interfaces:
Action, Cloneable
public record AttackAction(int agentId, Territory from, Territory to, int attackingArmies, int movingArmies) extends Record implements Action
Represents an action to attack a territory from another territory.

  • Constructor Details

    • AttackAction

      public AttackAction(int agentId, Territory from, Territory to, int attackingArmies, int movingArmies)
      Creates an instance of a AttackAction record class.
      Parameters:
      agentId - the value for the agentId record component
      from - the value for the from record component
      to - the value for the to record component
      attackingArmies - the value for the attackingArmies record component
      movingArmies - the value for the movingArmies record component

  • Method Details

    • apply

      public boolean apply(Game game) throws InvalidActionException
      Applies this action to the game.

      Actions are responsible for checking if the action itself is legal to be applied, and mutating the game state.

      Specified by:
      apply in interface Action
      Parameters:
      game - The game to apply the action to.
      Returns:
      true if the player claimed the territory.
      Throws:
      InvalidActionException - if the action was illegal in the game.

    • generateSortedDiceRolls

      public static int[] generateSortedDiceRolls(Random random, int n)
      Rolls n 6 sided dice, then sorts the array in reverse natural order.
      Parameters:
      random - The random number generator to use.
      n - The number of dice to roll.
      Returns:
      The sorted array of n dice rolls.

    • isTerminal

      public boolean isTerminal()
      Returns true iff this action represents an action that should end this agent's turn.
      Specified by:
      isTerminal in interface Action
      Returns:
      true if this action ends the turn.

    • clone

      public AttackAction clone()
      Returns a deep copy of this action.
      Specified by:
      clone in interface Action
      Overrides:
      clone in class Object
      Returns:
      A cloned copy of this action.

    • toString

      public final String toString()
      Returns a string representation of this record class. The representation contains the name of the class, followed by the name and value of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      toString in class Record
      Returns:
      a string representation of this object

    • hashCode

      public final int hashCode()
      Returns a hash code value for this object. The value is derived from the hash code of each of the record components.
      Specified by:
      hashCode in class Record
      Returns:
      a hash code value for this object

    • equals

      public final boolean equals(Object o)
      Indicates whether some other object is "equal to" this one. The objects are equal if the other object is of the same class and if all the record components are equal. Reference components are compared with Objects::equals(Object,Object); primitive components are compared with '=='.
      Specified by:
      equals in class Record
      Parameters:
      o - the object with which to compare
      Returns:
      true if this object is the same as the o argument; false otherwise.
